folderPicker.permissionTitle: Allow HexAgent to access files in "{{folder}}"?
folderPicker.permissionBody: This grants access to all files and subfolders. HexAgent will be able to read, edit, and delete files in this directory. File contents may be shared with connected AI models and tools. Avoid selecting folders containing sensitive or private data.

restartRequired.title: Restart Required
restartRequired.wslComplete: WSL runtime installation is complete, but Windows must restart before OpenAgent can continue.
restartRequired.pleaseRestart: Please restart your computer now, otherwise VM/Cowork features will not work.
restartRequired.confirmRestartNow: Restart Windows now? Unsaved work in other apps may be lost.
restartRequired.restartNotSupported: Immediate restart is only available in the desktop app on Windows.

sessionSetupFailed: Session setup failed. You can still send messages.
